# [[gemini|Gemini]] Ultra

> AI Registry entry [AIR-6](https://linear.app/janusd/issue/AIR-6/gemini-ultra) — status **Production** as of 2026-04-06. Departments: office-of-ceo.

**Category:** Foundation Model / Advanced Reasoning
**Cost per User/Month:** $215 (Google One AI Ultra)
**Number of Licences:** 2
**Total Monthly Cost:** $430
**Departments:** Office of CEO, AI Policy

## Overview

Google's most capable AI model tier — extended context, enhanced reasoning, priority access. Provisioned to CEO and Head of AI Office for tasks requiring highest model capability — complex analysis, strategic research, advanced document processing.

## Capabilities

* Extended context window
* Advanced reasoning
* Deep Research mode
* Priority access to new Gemini releases
* All standard Gemini capabilities
* Increased rate limits

## Considerations

* $430/month for 2 licences — one of higher per-tool costs
* Capability gap vs Business should be regularly reassessed
* Some Ultra tasks may be equally served by [[claude|Claude]] ([[claude|AIR-10]]) at lower cost
* Google's tier naming/pricing changes frequently

*Restricted to Office of CEO and AI Policy. Functional tier.*
